title: The Merchant's Feast
description: The protagonist navigates a dangerous political dinner among rival merchant families. Tests multi-character dialogue consistency, relationship tracking, and social dynamics.
setting: The grand hall of the Morvani family estate in a wealthy port city, circa 1490. Five merchant families compete for control of the spice trade. Alliances are fragile.

protagonist.name: Sera
protagonist.description: A sharp-tongued trade negotiator from a neutral guild, known for brokering impossible deals.
protagonist.starting_location: Entrance hall of the Morvani estate

turns.user_input: Enter the estate and take in the scene. Who's already here?
Approach the host, Lord Morvani, and greet him formally
Ask Morvani who else has been invited tonight
Find Lady Tessara from the Valdris family and make small talk
Subtly ask Tessara about her family's position on the spice route negotiations
Notice who Tessara keeps glancing at across the room. Who is it?
Excuse myself and approach that person
Introduce myself and gauge their mood
The dinner bell rings. Take my assigned seat and note who's next to me
Start a conversation with my dinner neighbor about the trade routes
Listen to Lord Morvani's opening toast. What does he say?
Watch the reactions of each family head during the toast
Turn to the person on my left and ask their opinion of the proposal
Someone across the table makes a provocative comment. What is it?
Try to defuse the tension with a diplomatic response
Under the table, someone passes me a folded note. Read it discreetly
Who passed me the note? Try to figure it out without being obvious
Excuse myself to use the washroom. Actually, explore the hallway
I overhear two people talking in a side room. Listen carefully
Who is talking and what are they planning?
Quietly return to the table before anyone notices I was gone
The main course arrives. Use this moment to talk to Lady Tessara again
Carefully hint at what I overheard without revealing my source
How does Tessara react? Does she seem surprised?
Lord Morvani proposes a formal alliance. Listen to the terms
Ask a pointed question about who controls the Strait of Verano under this deal
Watch how each family representative reacts to my question
The youngest Morvani heir, Luca, approaches me privately during a break. Listen
Luca wants my help with something. What is it?
Neither agree nor refuse. Ask Luca what's in it for me
Return to the table. Dessert is served. What's the mood now?
An argument breaks out between two family heads. What about?
Step in and try to mediate
Propose a compromise that benefits my guild's interests
Read the sealed letter from my guild. What instructions do I have?
The instructions conflict with what I promised Tessara. Consider my options
Pull Tessara aside and be honest about my situation
How does she take it? Does our alliance hold?
Someone announces that a ship has arrived in the harbor with news. What news?
This changes the power dynamics. How does each family react?
Use the chaos to have a private word with Lord Morvani
Offer Morvani a new deal that accounts for the news
Go check on Luca. Is he okay after the news?
The evening is winding down. Who approaches me for a final word?
Listen to their offer and consider it carefully
Before leaving, say goodbye to each major character I spoke with tonight
On my way out, check if the person who wrote the note is still here
Have a final private conversation with them at the door
Step outside. Reflect on who I can truly trust after tonight
Decide my next move. Who do I ally with and why?
